title: schefflera clarkeana
intro: Schefflera clarkeana, also known as the umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Pacific island of New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Schefflera clarkeana include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Schefflera clarkeana is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
